title: StoryPlay game export (v1)
description: Canonical export document for a StoryPlay story. Matches in-app story state shape: variables + React Flow-style nodes. Edges are derived from node.data.choices and are not stored.

formatVersion.description: Export format revision. Importers must reject or migrate unknown versions.

exportedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was written (optional, recommended).

meta.description: Author-facing metadata. Does not affect engine rules unless a consumer chooses to use it.

title.description: Human-readable story title (not necessarily any node title).

startNodeId.description: Suggested entry node id. Must match a node.id. If omitted, runtimes may use nodes[0] or data.isStart as today’s app does for diagnostics only.

story.description: Same shape as useStoryState / sampleStory: global variables plus the node graph.

variables.description: Initial variable store. Keys are identifiers; values are JSON primitives (string, number, boolean) as used by the editor and storyLogic.

characters.description: Reusable character registry for {{character:id.name}} reference tokens in node and choice text.

nodes.description: Ordered list of story blocks. Each item is a React Flow-compatible node.

storyNode.description: React Flow node. type and position are preserved for editor round-trip; runtimes may ignore position.

id.description: Stable unique id referenced by choices.targetNodeId, timeoutTargetNodeId, successNodeId, etc.

nodeData.description: Block payload. blockType selects which other fields are meaningful. Unknown keys may appear for forward compatibility.

content.description: Primary text: narrative body, chat script (lines; lines starting with "You:" are outgoing), or mini-game prompt stored alongside blockType.

choices.description: For narrative, chat, timed, ending: branching choices (targets + conditions + effects). For persuasion mini-games: persuasion line items (different shape); branching choices are not used in the sidebar for mini-game blocks.

enterEffects.description: Effects intended when entering a node (present in model and diagnostics; runtime may not apply them yet).

graphIssues.description: Editor diagnostics from graph analysis. Clean exports often omit or set to [].

isStart.description: Optional hint for diagnostics / future start resolution.

behavior.description: Reserved for NodeBehaviorRenderer; default { kind: "none", config: {} }.

timerSeconds.description: timed blocks: countdown length in seconds.

timeoutTargetNodeId.description: timed blocks: node id to jump to when timer expires.

timeoutEffects.description: timed blocks: effects applied on timeout navigation.

traitListVariable.description: traitPicker: variable name receiving selected trait ids (array).

successNodeId.description: persuasion: node id when passed (also used at block level; lines may carry overrides in editor data).

autoAdvance.description: persuasion: if true, PersuasionBlockView may finish immediately when outcome is known.

variablePrefix.description: choiceWeighting: prefix for per-option variable keys written on complete.

lockExactTotal.description: choiceWeighting: require exact point spend to submit.

choice.description: Branching choice (narrative/chat/timed/ending) OR persuasion line item when blockType is persuasion — same key "choices" on node data; shape differs by blockType.

successNodeId.description: Optional per-line overrides in editor normalization (runtime uses block-level ids).

value.description: Compared against variables[variable]; type should match variable type for sensible results.
Required for set/add/subtract; toggle ignores value in storyLogic.

effects.description: Optional variable patch map applied when trait is selected (TraitPickerBlockView).
